methodology: Projections use Engine C (Bayesian shrinkage with IPF-GL-stratified cohort slopes) summed across squat, bench, and deadlift to horizon = meet day. 95% prediction intervals are quadrature-summed per lift (sqrt of sum of squared half-widths). Class ordering: ascending by projected #1-vs-#2 gap; stale lifters (>2 yr since last meet) are shown but excluded from the gap calc. Status tags derive from meet count and tenure days. Lifters not found in OpenIPF appear under the Unranked Field section. Coverage: Canadian IPF-affiliated meets only. Not affiliated with the CPU or IPF.
